title: draba longiciliata
intro: Draba longiciliata, also known as the narrow-leaved draba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Draba longiciliata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared in herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, as well as in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a range of conditions.
